---
description: "Use when producing research outputs, reports, or analysis documents. Enforces citation requirements, confidence calibration, and structured evidence presentation."
applyTo: ["**/research/**", "**/reports/**", "**/analysis/**"]
---

# Research Output Standards

- Every factual claim must cite its source with URL or reference
- Mark unsourced inferences explicitly: "Based on the evidence, we infer..."
- Use calibrated confidence language:
  - "Strongly suggests" — 3+ corroborating credible sources
  - "Indicates" — 1-2 credible sources
  - "No evidence found" — absence of evidence noted
- Include a "Limitations" section in every report
- Include a "Sources" section with full references
- Flag single-source claims with ⚠️ markers
